title: How to build a custom vision agent
summary: John Capobianco demonstrates how to build a custom vision agent using Google Gemini and Model Context Protocol (MCP). The system captures live video from a webcam, processes natural language prompts and ASL conversations, and generates animated media using Veo 3.
writeup: John Capobianco walks through building a custom vision agent on Google Cloud using Gemini and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The agent captures live webcam video, handles natural language prompts and American Sign Language conversations, and generates animated media through Veo 3. The build illustrates how MCP connects a multimodal model to live camera input and media generation in a single workflow.
